title: SRS Protocol Definition (ext:protocol)
description: A facilitation protocol: a named, ordered sequence of stages that guide the extraction or authoring of a Record. Protocols are Package definitions stored under package/protocols/ (parallel to blueprints), not instance Records. The value-centric stored shape is described here — stage properties beyond those listed are permitted to support forward compatibility.

$schema.description: Optional self-referencing JSON Schema URI. Not present in stored protocol files authored before this schema was defined.

protocolId.description: Stable UUID for this Protocol. Never changes across versions.

protocolNamespace.description: Reverse-DNS namespace of the Package that owns this Protocol, e.g. governance or com.mudemocracy.

protocolName.description: Machine-readable name within the namespace, e.g. decision.

protocolVersion.description: Monotonically increasing version integer within this Protocol's UUID lineage.

protocolDescription.description: Human-readable description of what this Protocol guides and when to use it. Optional.

protocolTargetType.description: UUID of the Record Type this Protocol produces. Stages contributesTo values reference fields on this Type.

protocolStages.description: Ordered sequence of facilitation stages. Each stage guides extraction of one aspect of the target Record.

protocolCreatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when this Protocol was first authored.

ProtocolStage.description: One stage in the facilitation sequence. additionalProperties is true: the stored shape is value-centric and may carry fields beyond those listed here (e.g. richer contributesTo formats, custom per-stage metadata).

stageId.description: Stable UUID for this stage. Referenced by dependsOn in other stages.

name.description: Human-readable stage name, e.g. Background, Friction, Verdict.

order.description: 1-based position of this stage in the sequence.

purpose.description: One-sentence statement of what this stage captures and why it matters. Optional.

dependsOn.description: stageIds that must be complete before this stage can be meaningful. Empty array or absent means no dependencies.

question.description: The facilitation question posed to the group or the extraction prompt for this stage. Optional.

completionCriteria.description: Criterion for judging whether this stage has been adequately captured. Optional.

contributesTo.description: Field identifiers this stage contributes to on the target Record Type. Stored as bare field UUID strings in the value-centric format. Optional.

aiGuidance.description: Guidance for AI-assisted extraction: extraction probes, scope notes, or example phrases. May be a plain string or a structured object. Optional.

outputType.description: Optional type hint for the structured output of this stage. Implementation-defined shape.
